$comment: P2 bonus: wires AI Ark's MCP server as an EXTRA exploration channel alongside the API-driven pipeline. The pipeline itself always calls AI Ark over HTTP (see pipeline/clients/people_search.py); this is only so a reviewer can drop their own AI_ARK_TOKEN into the environment and connect the same account to Claude Code / Cursor for ad-hoc people_search exploration. Confirm the transport/url against AI Ark's MCP docs for your account; the token is read from the AI_ARK_TOKEN env var so no secret lives in the repo.
